name: tool-zhaopy-inbox-executa-adumwz8w
description: Anna Inbox — Gmail agent that surfaces attention cards and drafts replies via Executa Sampling LLM.

credentials.name: GMAIL_ACCESS_TOKEN
credentials.description: Optional Google OAuth access token. Local token files are used when platform injection is unavailable.

credentials.name: GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN
credentials.description: Alternative Google OAuth access token name supported by Anna platform credential mapping.

credentials.name: DASHSCOPE_API_KEY
credentials.description: DashScope API key used by the mail-agent LLM evaluator.

credentials.name: DASHSCOPE_MODEL
credentials.description: Optional DashScope model override. Defaults to qwen3-max.

tools: Provided by the describe JSON-RPC method at runtime.
